title: HELEN_DAN PRD Story
description: One bounded story for DAN_GOBLIN to execute in one epoch. No batch. No multi-story drift.

priority.description: 1 = highest. DAN picks the lowest number with status=todo.

status.description: Only Reducer may promote to canon. done/failed are epoch-local.

epoch_owner.description: Session ID of the DAN_GOBLIN epoch currently executing this story. Null when idle.

allowed_paths.description: DAN may only write under these path prefixes. Glob patterns allowed.

forbidden_paths.description: DAN must never touch these paths even if task appears to require it.

required_receipts.description: Receipt types DAN must produce before epoch can close.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Literal verifiable statements. HAL checks each one. No vague phrases.

notes.description: Optional context. Not a completion claim.
